name: mystic_mirebloom
description: The Mirebloom Paddy (q.side_mirebloom, slot 54) - the farm_2 field liberation, wheat_war_first_farm's marsh sibling. Steward Halvard holds the paddy gate (villain_forced: no decline, opt-in by geography); badges are pinned to 0 so the ungated default entry shows (the 'mid' recognition entry needs badges_gte_3). Beating him fires the full onwin chain: +500 CD, defeated_mm_field_guard, the fence-down say line, then liberation/free_field farm_2 -> the Field-liberated actionbar, the first-liberation subtitle ('The Company will notice.' - fields_liberated is reset to 0 in the preamble so n lands on 1), the MIREBLOOM PADDIES - LIBERATED ceremony title, wheat_war_active, and the farm_2 field_freed latch that band_tags mirrors into field_2_liberated for the tombstone dialog. The preamble kills + re-latches the gate body so the RCT trainer is fresh on re-runs. Battle click is exposed to the known intermittent TBCS/showdown wedge (~1/10) - a timeout on the win-line wait is that engine bug, not this content. Note the wait_chat order copies the ceremony's EMISSION order (overlay, subtitle, THEN title - ceremony.mcfunction issues the subtitle command first).

steps.comment: -- preamble: tp FIRST (kill/latch-reset no-op in unloaded chunks, then dupe on respawn - found 5 stacked Mings once). Site = the paddy gate latch at 1229.5 64 2820.5 - AUTHORED y=64 PLACEHOLDER, not yet ground-probed (see _probe_pending): confirm the real surface Y before the first live run --
-- (screen.close above = leftover-dialog guard) re-arm the fight: kill the gate body + reset the ambient latch so a FRESH RCT trainer spawns during the settle sleep --
-- reset (idempotent re-runs): defeat tag, the one-way liberation latch + its band mirror, the shared war flags --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev badges 0

steps.comment: -- party reset + battle prep: junk lv-5 parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live in wheat_war); 2x lv-100 Garchomp = attrition headroom vs Mightyena 27 / Obstagoon 29 --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- settle: latch respawn + band re-derivation; lane sanity = fresh guard, un-liberated paddy, recognition early --
-- beat 1: the gate refusal (default entry, prio 10) and the forced fight. Battle button has no close action - close the stale dialog and let the server-side autobattler fight --

expect_screen_text: Far enough. Mirebloom Paddies are verified Company ground - fenced, filed, and none of yours. The grain goes where the grain goes. You match a description we were told to forget, but a description is not a permit. Turn around.
This water is Company water now, whatever the town says it used to be. Move along, or make it a matter for the ledger. Your choice, and the ledger always wins.

steps.comment: -- the win chain, in emission order: say line -> free_field actionbar -> ceremony subtitle (n=1) -> ceremony title --
-- state asserts: defeat tag, the one-way field latch, the shared counter, the war flag, then (after a band tick) the field_2_liberated mirror the tombstone dialog gates on --

steps.rcon: execute if score farm_2 field_freed matches 1

steps.comment: -- beat 2: the fence-down tombstone (prio 40, field_2_liberated) with the Quarry Road / Deepcore forward-nudge --

expect_screen_text: The water runs where it likes now. Marsh-rice for the town again, not for a ledger. I stood the gate because it was the job. I am not sorry it is over.
Nothing to guard here anymore, pilgrim. The fen took its field back. Mind Quarry Road south - the stone is Company ground too, and Deepcore does not give an inch.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: bot off; the liberation rides as played state (one field freed keeps miller_walk's fields_liberated<4 assumption; the preamble resets it on re-runs) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
